title: Golden Gooey Norwegian Cabbage Gratin
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring hispi sweetheart cabbage, rest meat, and a crispy golden crust. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Rest Meat (such as pork or beef)

instructions: Arrange the cabbage and meat in a single layer in 6-8 ramekins.
Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the flour and whisk to combine. Cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly golden.
Gradually pour in the chicken broth, whisking to avoid lumps. Bring to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the mixture thickens.
Remove from heat and stir in the heavy cream, if using. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Pour the sauce over the cabbage and meat in the ramekins.
Dot the top of each ramekin with the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Cover with foil and bake for 20-25 minutes, until the cabbage is tender and the top is golden brown.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 5-10 minutes, until the top is crispy and golden.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh thyme, if desired.
Let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Let cool completely before refrigerating or freezing for later.
